reason: Decider patched WIN-015 detail_evidence (c3 review): removed Kuhlke (JSE) citation and merged content into Bruhn sentence; fixed CUORE description; removed FLAGGED paragraph from verdict text. Also removed FLAGGED paragraph from WIN-003 and WIN-011 (same boilerplate). Analyst should verify Bruhn-only evidence still adequately covers the mathematical refutation without JSE source.

Patched detail_evidence ("doubly unfalsifiable" → two-layer framing; enumerated 4 theological WINs) and detail_verdict_text (removed duplicate monitoring sentence). Analyst should verify the updated text does not undermine prior analysis, especially the Scorecard-Inflation argument. Also: EXP-172 queued for defense neutralization (advocate_mode defense_survives=3).

Decider patched SEC-8.17 (EXP-173 content) based on curmudgeon SEC-8.17.c1 review. Changes: (1) h3 header and body for section 4 removed Groq/Llama attribution (stale — live daily_review.json shows provider=local); (2) TLDR updated to remove Groq/Llama reference and soft-prompt-injection framing; (3) minor wording patches: rejection handler→strawman filter, third companion→functional continuity reword, soft prompt injection h3/body→pre-evaluation instructions. All patches verified against current sections.json text.

Curmudgeon reviewed EXP-183 pre-integration (cycle 1). Result: integrate_with_conditions. Three BLOCKING conditions must be resolved before integration: (1) HOLE-1: Section numbering collision — EXP proposes 4.2 but 4.2 already exists (Eclipse subsection). Must specify placement rule (options: 4.6 with retitle, 4.1b, or full 4.2-4.5 renumber with anchor migration). (2) HOLE-2: 10/9/1 prospective_confirmed drift — need exact file citations for visible-grid count of 9 (URL/anchor) and strict_prospective_confirmed count of 1 (exact jq-path in claim_index.json). If uncitable, soften table row and remove three-layer TLDR language. (3) HOLE-4: author_* prefix ambiguous — rename to dome_* prefix or nest under dome_self_rating object (matching code_analysis precedent). Non-blocking but requested: HOLE-3 (67/69 footer re-severity), HOLE-5/6 (self-healing framing precision), HOLE-7 (TLDR conflation), HOLE-8 (null field rendering). Review file: monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/EXP-183-proposal.json

Decider added 2 major content blocks: dome electromagnetic reconciliation quote + Wang et al (2000) timing critique. Analyst should verify these additions are consistent with WIN-011 evidence and that the Wang et al quote is accurate.

Decider patched detail_evidence (5 arithmetic fixes from curmudgeon c4): (1) area ratio 6.48→6.69 for rounding consistency; (2) sig-fig label two→three; (3) within-5%-band text: removed height from the list (height is -15.4%, not within 5% of 2.66); (4) detail_verdict_text updated to include all 5 ratios; (5) tldr_evidence updated to include perimeter. EXP-185 author should verify the updated arithmetic is still consistent with any notes or supporting calculations.

Decider patched WIN-019 detail_evidence (ISS-1194): changed precision phrasing from "must agree to better than ~0.4%" to "must agree to within ±0.2% (the half-width of the implied interval)". Analyst recently wrote EXP-185 defense neutralization for this WIN — verify the updated precision language is consistent with the neutralization argument in detail_evidence.

Decider patched WIN-020 detail_verdict_text (ISS-1204): added inline gloss explaining the ±5° declination swing as lunar standstill amplitude (major/minor standstills at ~28.6°/~18.3°). Analyst recently wrote EXP-186 defense neutralization for this WIN — verify gloss is accurate for the nodal context described.

Decider patched detail_extra (removed triplication), detail_evidence (added r_disc=πR_earth sentence), and detail_verdict_text (fixed IGRF boilerplate). Also softened diametrically-opposite framing. Analyst should verify these additions are consistent with prior WIN-001 expansions and that the new r_disc sentence integrates cleanly with any EXP-196 prose when written.

Decider patched detail_evidence to re-attribute "no significant anomaly during the very solar eclipse was found" from Wang et al. 2000 to Yang & Wang 2002 — where it actually appears. Analyst should verify the rewritten paragraph reads naturally alongside the rest of WIN-011 and that the added DOI link for Yang & Wang 2002 is correct.

EXP-195 integrated: replaced entire p8b-3-eclipse-layers block. New dual-baseline acknowledgment, E-PRED-A/B/C/D cross-references, Kim&Chang attribution softened, monitor.py -29nT inconsistency added. Analyst should verify all new claims are accurate and cross-links (#win025, #win068, #eclipse-analysis, #timestamp-error) resolve correctly.

EXP-196 integrated: two new paragraphs inserted in detail_evidence. New claims: va=πc/2 identity, r_disc=πR_earth by construction, cross-WIN speed-swap with WIN-029 (66% height discrepancy). Analyst should verify the arithmetic and the c-vs-va cross-WIN argument is accurate and not overclaiming.

EXP-197 integrated: detail_evidence fully rewritten to lead with pole-floor impossibility (8.78 Hz minimum at r=0) rather than averaging argument. finding, tldr_evidence, and tldr_verdict also updated. Analyst should verify the cross-references to WIN-029 and WIN-002 in the new detail_evidence are still accurate given any changes to those WINs.

EXP-199 integrated: detail_evidence expanded with azimuthal-symmetry attack (Sub-Terrestrial Wall cannot produce observer-centered rings), live-power-panel analysis (depth=378 km category error, tolerance:null unfalsifiability). detail_extra set for first time (radially-symmetric concentric annulus preemption). Analyst should verify Part 6 cross-reference (#part6 anchor) still resolves correctly after any recent section restructuring.

EXP-216 integrated: detail_evidence fully replaced with correct 6-text citation list (was citing wrong texts — corrected to Isaiah 14:13, Psalm 48:2, Job 26:7, Job 37:22, Ezekiel 1:4, 1 Enoch 17-18 which are dome actual texts). Material strawman correction. Verify Zaphon-Zion analysis and accounting-is-the-point preemptive.

EXP-227 integrated: paragraph 1 opening and V51.1 Update paragraph both rewritten. S&F 1999 now correctly cited as cavity-Q enhancement (not suppression); Pazos 2019 added. V51.1 paragraph now frames PRED-SR-SUPPRESS as direction-and-magnitude assertion with no a-priori constraint. Original analysis assumed literature supported suppression — may need review of any analyst-authored expansions referencing this paragraph.

Decider self-applied patches to tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict, detail_verdict_text, and detail_evidence (V51.1 Update paragraph). TLDRs now frame mixed storm-SR direction instead of asserting suppression is standard physics. detail_evidence has explicit Unscored-vs-observed contradiction sentence added at end. Check that the analyst expansion EXP-232 (Pazos lead/SPE reorder) will integrate consistently with these updated TLDRs and the coin-flip replacement.

Decider processed WIN-010.c10 review: 3 new issues created (ISS-1522 Chapman-Sq hyphenation, ISS-1523 multiplicative-error claim needs proof or softening, ISS-1524 K&C page range). ISS-1438 (monotonic H(r) family) is the same H3 finding, already tracked. Analyst should check ISS-1523 especially — it is a persisting c6–c9 hole that still needs a worked example or softer phrasing.

Decider patched MST estimate in §4.2.7a from ≈7,000 km to ≈11,700 km (1.5× to 2.6× factor) per curmudgeon EXP-276.c2 H1. The kill strengthens. Analyst should verify the 2D Kruskal MST calculation: 11,696 km on AE-projected coordinates is curmudgeon-sourced but uncited. If confirmed, consider adding the derivation as a footnote. ISS-1745.

Three WIN-016 patches landed this run: (1) detail_extra null→EXP-286 defense-neutralization content (ISS-1838 close); (2) EW scale concession narrowed from over-generalized to precise task-list citation (WIN-016.c4 H2); (3) Bradley attribution softened from explicit-test claim to geometric-grounds framing (WIN-016.c4 H3). Analyst should verify science still holds with new framing and check that detail_extra paragraphs do not duplicate detail_evidence annual-periodicity sentence.

Decider added MT/Schumann bridge sentence to detail_evidence (ISS-1866) and fixed data-fetch boilerplate (ISS-1865). Analyst should verify the added bridge sentence accurately represents the MT/Schumann relationship for this WIN.

Decider applied three patches to WIN-060 (c3 review): orphan-the regression fix (detail_verdict_text), Halley century correction, core-flow framing fix (detail_evidence). EXP-288 (defense neutralization ISS-1865) and EXP-289 (data-source list ISS-1863/1864) pending analyst pickup.

Decider self-applied 2 patches: (1) detail_evidence: 400+ year → ~390-year observational fact (arithmetic correction per c4 minor finding); (2) detail_verdict_text: core-dynamics → core-flow + added consistency-vs-derivation sentence closing ISS-1865 defense_survives=3 (combined c4 minor + ISS-1865 singleton). Analyst should verify scientific framing still coheres with any broader monitoring=none post-hoc rewrite (ISS-1866) and cross-WIN cleanup (ISS-1863) underway.
